name: Black Bean & Corn Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Fresh corn -- cut from cob
1 cup Canned black beans -- rinsed and drained
1 Jalapeno pepper -- seeded and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the fresh corn in a small amount of boiling water for 4 minutes, or until crisp-tender. Drain and cool.
2. Combine the cooked corn with the remaining ingredients in a bowl.
3. Makes 4 cups of salsa.
Cook's Notes:
1 1/2 cups frozen whole kernel corn may be substituted. For variation and additional flavor, try adding chopped tomatoes and onions or sliced scallions.
